meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Contact the MatchWorky team for support, sales questions, and privacy-related requests.

contact.title: Talk to us
contact.description: If you need help with setup, billing, or privacy, our team responds through clear and practical channels.
contact.sideNoteBody: Operational requests are answered on business days. Urgent access and security issues are prioritized the same day.

sections.title: Technical support
body: Email: suporte@matchworky.pt
Include your company slug and a short description of the issue whenever possible.

sections.title: Sales and partnerships
body: Email: hello@matchworky.pt
Share your expected hiring volume and current workflow so we can prepare a proposal tailored to your context.

sections.title: Privacy and data
body: Email: privacidade@matchworky.pt
Requests for access, correction, or deletion should reference the company responsible for the recruiting process.

meta.title: About
meta.description: Learn about MatchWorky's mission and how we design clearer interview experiences for teams and candidates.

about.title: About us
about.description: MatchWorky was created to reduce friction in early-stage hiring with consistent interviews and objective response insights.
about.sideNoteBody: We build a product that is simple to run daily: create a role, share a link, review responses, and decide with context.

sections.title: 1. Why we exist
body: Many teams lose time with manual screening and unstructured first interviews.
We created a conversational layer to standardize this stage while preserving human judgment in final decisions.

sections.title: 2. How we work
body: The product prioritizes clarity: objective interface, comparable outcomes, and lean setup for each role.
Every improvement is validated by real usage from hiring teams, not short-term visual trends.

sections.title: 3. Product principles
body: Respect for candidate experience, with transparent flows and direct communication.
Privacy by default, with company-controlled data and only the minimum required audit trail.

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: How personal data is collected, used, and protected in MatchWorky.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.description: We explain clearly what data we process, why we process it, and how you can exercise your rights at any time.
privacy.sideNoteBody: Each customer company defines the legal basis for recruiting. MatchWorky acts as a data processor to operate interviews and analysis.

sections.title: 1. Data collected
body: We may collect identification and contact data, interview responses, and session technical metadata to ensure operation and basic auditing.
We do not collect sensitive information unless there is an objective need for the candidate process configured by the customer.

sections.title: 2. Processing purposes
body: Data is used to run interviews, show results in the admin dashboard, and enable structured candidate comparison.
We also use technical data for security, abuse prevention, and platform stability improvements.

sections.title: 3. Retention and deletion
body: Data remains available for the period defined by each customer, respecting legal obligations and legitimate hiring needs.
On request, records can be deleted or historical data can be anonymized when no longer needed for hiring decisions.

sections.title: 4. Data subject rights
body: You may request access, correction, deletion, restriction of processing, and portability under applicable law.
Privacy requests can be submitted through the contact page and are routed for response within a reasonable timeframe.

meta.title: Terms of Service
meta.description: Terms of use for MatchWorky for hiring teams and candidates.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.description: By using MatchWorky, you accept these terms to ensure clear, safe, and predictable usage for companies and candidates.
terms.sideNoteBody: These terms apply to all use of the web platform. When updated, the revision date will be published on this page.

sections.title: 1. Platform usage
body: The platform is intended for hiring teams that want to structure initial interviews with AI support.
It is not allowed to use the service for data collection without legal basis, abusive content, or any activity violating applicable law.

sections.title: 2. Accounts and access
body: Each company account is responsible for managing admin access and credential security.
We recommend regular review of panel users and immediate revocation of access that is no longer required.

sections.title: 3. Interview data
body: Data collected during interviews belongs to the customer creating the role and should follow their internal hiring policy.
MatchWorky processes data to provide screening, analysis, and reporting features, without parallel commercial use of that data.

sections.title: 4. Availability and support
body: We work to ensure high availability, but occasional interruptions may happen for maintenance, updates, or incident mitigation.
Operational issues can be reported through the contact page for technical follow-up.
